summary: Frontend-only testing completed for Web3 Wallet Adventure app. All core UI features working correctly. App loads, navigation works, game levels are accessible, and Progress Dashboard displays properly.

minor.issue: 502 error in console - backend not tested per request (frontend-only testing)

integration_issues.issue: TransactionHistory component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/wallet/TransactionHistory.jsx with data-testid='export-diary-pdf-btn' but is NOT imported or used anywhere in the app. Component is orphaned.

action_items: CRITICAL: TransactionHistory component with PDF export is not integrated into the app - needs to be imported and rendered somewhere (e.g., in ProgressDashboard or as a separate tab/view)
Consider adding TransactionHistory to ProgressDashboard to show wallet transaction history with PDF export functionality
critical_code_review_comments: TransactionHistory.jsx (lines 15-71) implements PDF export using jsPDF but component is never imported/used in the app
ESLint warnings in GasFeeMiniGame.jsx and TransactionSimulator.jsx about missing useEffect dependencies - minor but should be fixed
vercel.json configuration is correct with proper buildCommand, outputDirectory, installCommand, framework=null, and SPA rewrites
test_credentials: No authentication required - game uses localStorage for progress
context_for_next_testing_agent: TransactionHistory component needs to be integrated into the app. The component is fully implemented with PDF export using jsPDF and jspdf-autotable but is orphaned. All other features (Start Screen, Game Map with 5 levels, Level 1 gameplay, Progress Dashboard) work correctly. Build succeeds with yarn build.
tests_passed: App loads correctly with 'Web3 Wallet Adventure' title
Start Adventure button works and navigates to game map
Game map shows 5 levels with proper titles (Icon Seed Phrase Adventure, Receive Coins, Send with Gas Fees, Smart Contract Promise, Vault Your Treasure)
Level 1 (Icon Seed Phrase Adventure) can be selected and played
Progress Dashboard shows XP bar, levels completed, and badges
Vercel config at /app/frontend/vercel.json has correct build settings
Frontend build succeeds without errors (yarn build)
tests_failed: TransactionHistory component with Export PDF button is not accessible in the app (component exists but not integrated)

mocked_features.note: Web3 elements (wallets, seeds, transactions) are purely educational mocks - no real blockchain integration
